titleStmt.title: SII 22.169: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 169. (A.R. No. 169 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—IN THE SAME PLACE. VIKRAMA-CHŌḶA—13th YEAR (A.D. 1130-31).

summary.p: The introduction is the same as the one given in No. 168 above. The inscription registers a written understanding (uḷvari ?) agreed to by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple fixing the quantum of allowances to be received by them and of the items of offerings they had to provide during the daily early morning service to gods Vighnēśvara, Naṭarāja, Pirāṭṭiyār (goddess) and Kshētrapāladēva in the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍa-Dēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tantiruppatu malar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉiya Urimaiyil
maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali nikki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭarmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti
Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭainiḻaṟṟa cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉattu tribhuvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkara varttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu milāṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭu pāṉūṟkūṟṟattu
brahmadeyam Iṟaiyānaraiyūrāṉa śrīcoḻakeraḷac catuppetimaṅkalattu Ūrpākaṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa devar koyilil sthānapatikaḷ civabrāhmaṇarom It tevar koyiliṟ piṭilikai vāriyāl nāṅkaḷ kaikkoḷḷakkaṭavaṉattukku Uḷvari Araikkāluṭpaṭṭa
poṉnum tiramam Oṉṟum tūṇi Uṭppaṭa Ariciyum nel Irutūṇip patakkum ney Eṇṇai nānāḻi Uṭpaṭṭatum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku Irunūṟu Uṭ paṭṭatum Ilaiyamutu nālupaṟṟu Uṭpaṭṭatum kaṟiyamutu Iraṇṭu niṟai Uṭpaṭṭatum
tayiramutum tirukkoṭiyum tiruccāṉtāṭalum Uttiramum Āka Ittaṉaiyum kaikkoṇṭu ceyyakkaṭava niman=tam ciṟukālaisan=tikku vighneśvarappiḷḷaikku Arici Iru nāḻiyum kūttāṭu devarkku Arici nānāḻiyum pirāṭṭiyāṟku Arici Irunāḻiyum kṣetravāladevaṟku Arici Irunāḻiyum Āka Arici patiṉ nāḻiyum Amutu Iraṇṭum miḷakum Uppum neyyamutu tayiramutum pākku Irupatum Āka Ittaṉaiyum śantrā dityavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomāṉom Ittevar koyilil śivabrāhmaṇarom panmā heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
